opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: They just won't walk today and keep crying that their legs hurt. I also noticed these tiny red spots all over their tummy this evening, and they've been burning up and completely wiped out for the last couple of days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My child suddenly can't stand because both legs hurt so much, there are new little red spots that don't fade, and they keep spiking fevers and are exhausted — it's all come on fast over the last two days and I'm frightened.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about two days ago as being generally tired and floppy
symptom_narrative.character: began as tiredness, then bad pain in both legs so they won't stand or walk, and this evening tiny red-purple pinpoint spots appeared on the tummy and legs plus some bruises on the shins
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst I've seen them — carried everywhere, cries when I move their legs
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both legs (shins and thighs), red spots on tummy and lower legs, bruises on the shins
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and steadily worsening over the two days; fevers keep coming back
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much — a dose of paracetamol barely touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving or touching their legs makes the crying worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: recurrent low-grade fevers, looks very pale, floppy and drained, off their food
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — normally a well, active child
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: bedbound, being carried, refusing to weight-bear or play

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: normally a healthy, active 4-year-old with nothing wrong before this

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: a dose given about 3 hours ago for the pain and fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: young child at home with parents; mother is present and made the call and is very worried about a rapid decline overnight

objective_data_offered.value: 37.9 degrees on our digital thermometer a little while ago, but they've felt hotter on and off
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home reading; fevers reported as intermittent so a normal spot reading does not exclude ongoing fever

objective_data_offered.value: lots of tiny red-purple pinpoint spots over the tummy and lower legs that do NOT fade when I press a glass on them
several bruises on both shins that came up without any bumps or falls
very pale, floppy and worn out, resting in my arms and grizzly
won't stand or walk and cries that both legs hurt when moved
